_readme: This file contains all email content for Pookie Wishes. Variables are wrapped in {{double_braces}}. Load this in EmailJS template builder.

1_user_acknowledgement._when: Sent to customer immediately after they submit order + payment screenshot
1_user_acknowledgement.subject: We've received your order! 🎂 — {{order_id}}

2_admin_verify._when: Sent to nikhil2005114@gmail.com immediately after customer submits
2_admin_verify.subject: [NEW ORDER] Verify Payment — {{order_id}} — {{total_amount}}

3_google_form_link._when: Sent to customer after you reply DONE to the verification email
3_google_form_link._trigger: Admin replies DONE to email_2 → EmailJS sends this
3_google_form_link.subject: Payment Confirmed! 🎉 Fill this form to personalise your website — {{order_id}}
3_google_form_link.body:
Hi {{buyer_name}}! 🎉

Great news — your payment has been verified! We're ready to start building your birthday website for {{bday_person_name}}. 🎂

Now we need a few details from you to make it truly personal.

📋 FILL THIS GOOGLE FORM:
{{google_form_link}}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
HOW TO FILL THE FORM
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1. OPEN the form link above

2. YOUR ORDER ID is: {{order_id}}
   (Enter this in the first field so we can match it to your order)

3. WISH MESSAGE — Write a heartfelt birthday message. This will appear inside the website. It can be as long or short as you like!

4. PHOTOS — Upload up to 3 photos:
   • Photos of you and the birthday person
   • Solo photos of them
   • A mix of both — whatever feels right!
   Tip: Make sure photos are clear and good quality.

5. SPECIAL REQUESTS — Mention anything specific you'd like included, changed, or personalised.

6. SUBMIT the form.

⏳ Once you submit, we'll get to work and deliver your website link + QR code within 24 hours!

Need help with the form? WhatsApp us at +91 8700113731 — we're happy to assist!

With love and excitement,
The Pookie Wishes Team ✨
https://pookie-wishes.vercel.app

4_admin_form_submitted._when: Sent to nikhil2005114@gmail.com when customer submits the Google Form
4_admin_form_submitted._trigger: Google Form submit → Google Sheet update → Apps Script / Zapier sends this email
4_admin_form_submitted.subject: [ACTION] Customer Form Submitted — {{order_id}} — Start Working!
4_admin_form_submitted.body:
A customer has submitted their personalisation form! Time to start building.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
ORDER
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Order ID:   {{order_id}}
Template:   {{template_name}}
Customer:   {{buyer_name}} ({{buyer_email}})

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
WHAT THEY SUBMITTED
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Wish Message:
{{wish_message}}

Photos: (Check Google Sheet for uploaded files)
{{google_sheet_link}}

Special Requests:
{{special_requests}}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
NEXT STEP
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Build the website, then reply to this email with:

  LINK: https://your-built-website.vercel.app
  QR: https://your-qr-image-url.com/qr.png

The system will send the delivery email to the customer automatically.

Admin Panel: https://pookie-wishes.vercel.app/admin/

5_delivery._when: Sent to customer when you reply with LINK and QR to email_4
5_delivery._trigger: Admin replies with LINK + QR → EmailJS sends this to customer
5_delivery.subject: Your Birthday Website is Ready! 🎁✨ — {{order_id}}
5_delivery.body:
Hi {{buyer_name}}! 🎉🎂

We're absolutely thrilled to deliver your personalised birthday website for {{bday_person_name}}! We've put so much love into making it special.

🔗 YOUR BIRTHDAY WEBSITE:
{{website_link}}

📱 QR CODE:
{{qr_image_url}}
(Save this image — your person can scan it to open the website directly!)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
HOW TO SHARE IT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
• Copy the link and send it via WhatsApp, Instagram DM, or SMS
• Save the QR image and share it — they scan it to open the website
• Post it on their birthday — timing is everything! 🎊

💡 TIP: The website works best on mobile. Ask them to open it somewhere private so they can experience the full surprise!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
YOUR ORDER
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Order ID:   {{order_id}}
Template:   {{template_name}}
For:        {{bday_person_name}}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
We'd love to see their reaction! Tag us @pookiewish on Instagram 💖
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Thank you for choosing Pookie Wishes. Hope this makes their birthday truly unforgettable! 🌸

With so much love,
The Pookie Wishes Team ✨
https://pookie-wishes.vercel.app

variables_reference.template_name: e.g. Hello Kitty 🎀 or Harry Potter ⚡
variables_reference.bday_person_name: From checkout form — who the website is for
variables_reference.bday_date: From checkout form — their birthday date
variables_reference.needed_by: From checkout form — when they need it by
variables_reference.screenshot_url: Firebase Storage URL of payment screenshot
variables_reference.google_form_link: Your Google Form URL from site.json
variables_reference.website_link: URL you provide in admin panel after building
variables_reference.qr_image_url: QR image URL you upload in admin panel
